channel.title: Science on Maya Sarangan
channel.description: Recent content in Science on Maya Sarangan

item.title: Who Actually Makes Rainbows?
item.description: My little brother invited his friend over for a playdate at our house. They ate snacks, played, and ended up watching a TV show called “My Little Pony”. It is a kids show featuring unicorns. I glanced over at the TV screen and watched a scene about a young unicorn sliding on the rainbow. The rainbow was solid, and included the color pink!(Since it is a kids show, I let it slide…) According to the character on the TV show, rainbows are made by pegasus ponies in a factory on Cloudsdale. Now, this made me wonder, how are rainbows actually made? Are they really made by pegasus ponies in a factory on Cloudsdale? These are the questions I will be answering today. Let’s go!
